heading: Citizenship of officers of vessels
label: 8215 Citizenship of officers of vessels
text: The officers of vessels of the United States shall in all cases by citizens of the United States.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6019.34 U.S.C. 211R.S. 1428.
